properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All of my life I've searched for You Lord You called me to Your side With all of my heart, I'm desperate for more Your presence is my life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The cry of my heart Is to be where You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love Your presence I love Your presence Father where You are is where I wanna be Hidden in Your courts is everything I need

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my strength, You are my shield Surround me with Your song All that my soul will know is Your peace You hide me in Your love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The cry of my heart Is to be where You are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I love Your presence I love Your presence Father where You are is where I wanna be Hidden in Your courts is everything I need

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I love Your presence I love Your presence I can hear You call, I run into Your arms Jesus You are all, my heart is longing for

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Father You are my heart's desire Overwhelmed I will worship You I will dance to the dance of heaven All my heart be enthralled by You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I love Your presence I love Your presence Father where You are is where I wanna be Hidden in Your courts is everything I need

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I love Your presence I love Your presence I can hear You call, I run into Your arms Jesus You are all, my heart is longing for
